top_signals.title: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
top_signals.summary: While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran war squeezes acid, aluminum, miners’ margins: WoodMac
top_signals.summary: The clash has disrupted more than half the seaborne sulphur trade, shut in about 11 million bbl/d of crude and put 3-3.5Mt of aluminum output at risk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Circle partners with Nium to connect USDC settlement to global payout rails
top_signals.summary: Circle and Nium have partnered to connect stablecoin settlement with global payout rails across more than 190 countries and 100 currencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
